calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-457 GOV-FANOUT-1 PAIR H-credit x H-return (additivity cell): credit + return + pair vs sparse, z_world + raw 5x5, diagnostic
items.note: GOV-FANOUT-1 leg 5/5, the mandated PAIR cell (user directive 2026-07-14: the gap has two plausibly-ADDITIVE halves -- credit-propagation H-credit + frontier-return H-return). Runs H-credit alone, H-return alone, AND the pair SAME-RUN on both reps so additivity/complementarity is directly READABLE, not inferred. Load-bearing DV = pair exceeds the better single by >= 1.0 resource/ep (complementarity), strict majority seeds, clears floor. BOTH z_world + raw as separate reuse-eligible arms; sparse baseline same-run both reps. DIAGNOSTIC -> excluded from scoring; routes to /failure-autopsy. MECH-457 candidate/v3_pending. Re-derive brake does NOT fire. Cloud-pinned for reuse-eligible mints. Smoke PASS + validate_experiments --strict OK 2026-07-14.

items.title: INV-089 harm_eval_z_harm calibrated bound -- VARIANCE-REDUCED, VALID-DV re-estimate of 746a (target standardisation + k-fold + early-stop + more data)
items.note: VARIANCE-REDUCED, VALID-DV re-estimate of V3-EXQ-746a's INV-089 harm-evaluator z_harm calibrated bound. 746a met all preconditions and WEAKENED, but that weakens rode a DV MEASUREMENT ARTIFACT: 746a's IV (local-density ridge-decode from frozen z_harm) is clean/moving (~0.37-0.40, PC_iv_moved True) while its DV (trained harm_eval_z_harm MLP head) produced held-out R2 -26..-69, per-seed dv_delta -4.7..-166 -- while a scale-robust ridge on the SAME (z_harm,target) gets +0.38. Real-cell diagnosis 2026-07-15: the tiny-magnitude Ydens target (raw std ~0.02) makes MSE ill-conditioned for a fresh O(1)-output MLP. FIXES (DV estimator + power, maturation recipe + IV probe unchanged): (1) STANDARDISE the DV training target with fold-train mean/std (R2 affine-invariant -> same quantity; measured DV -1.000 raw -> +0.33 std at n~195, +0.47/+0.52 at n~780), (2) K=5-fold averaged held-out R2, (3) weight decay + inner-val EARLY STOPPING, (4) finite per-fold R2 floor at -1, (5) collect_episodes 14->60 (~780 samples) for power. NEW PC_dv_estimator_ok precondition: mature-anchor DV must beat the mean (>=0) given the target is ridge-decodable at ~0.4, else non_contributory (never a false weakens). 2-seed real validation: pre_met True, mean_dv_mature 0.48, sd_dv_delta 0.018 (vs 746a 54.7 -- ~3000x variance reduction). GOV-REUSE-1: the VALID-DV bound-coupling readout is NOT recoverable from 746a (its DV was pathological, per-fold floored to -1); IV reused via the shared maturation_curriculum module, DV re-measured -> partial-recoverable downgrade to the missing valid DV. Because collection widened, 746b does NOT reuse 746a's prefix -- it MINTS its own reuse-eligible cloud-class prefix (include_driver_script_in_hash=False), hence machine_affinity ree-cloud-2. Re-derive brake: 0 substrate_ceiling/non_contributory autopsies tag INV-089 -> not braked; z_harm observable (NOT a z_world 740b). Ethics all-false/allow (frozen-representation probe). experiment_purpose=evidence; supersedes NOTHING (extends 743, re-estimates 746a; governance may mark 746a superseded IF 746b PASSes on the valid DV). validate_experiments --strict --paths OK; dry-run smoke PASS; 2-seed full-pipeline validation PASS (valid DV, preconditions met, tight variance).
